metadata.title: Dupont & Associates — Business Law Firm
metadata.description: Specialized law firm in business, tax and labor law. Legal advisory services for your projects in Cameroon and Central Africa. Based in Yaoundé.
metadata.keywords: law firm Yaoundé, business law Cameroon, legal counsel, tax, OHADA

hero.headline: Legal Excellence in Service of Your Ambitions
hero.description: Since 2008, Dupont & Associates has guided Cameroonian and international companies through their legal and strategic challenges. Recognized expertise, a human approach.

about.label: Our story
about.headline: A Different Vision of Business Law
about.description: Founded in Yaoundé by Maître Jean-Pierre Dupont, our firm brings together a team of multilingual jurists trained at leading African and European universities. We believe law should be a growth tool, not an obstacle.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We always act in the exclusive interest of our clients, with absolute transparency and honesty.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.description: Our team continuously trains on developments in OHADA, CEMAC and international law.

proximity.title: Proximity
proximity.description: Every client has a dedicated, available and responsive contact for all their concerns.

services.label: Areas of expertise
services.headline: Legal Solutions Tailored to Your Challenges
services.description: From preventive counsel to courtroom representation, we support you across all your legal matters.

business_law.title: Business Law
business_law.description: Company formation, commercial contracts, mergers & acquisitions, joint ventures. Recognized OHADA expertise.

tax_law.title: Tax Law
tax_law.description: Tax optimization, tax audits, transfer pricing, VAT. Personalized advice for SMEs and large companies.

labor_law.title: Labor Law
labor_law.description: Management of individual and collective labor relations. Contract drafting, dismissals, representation before the tribunal.

arbitration.title: Arbitration & Mediation
arbitration.description: Resolution of commercial disputes through alternative dispute resolution. Speed and confidentiality.

real_estate_law.title: Real Estate Law
real_estate_law.description: Securing real estate transactions, commercial leases, construction law in Cameroon.

banking_finance.title: Banking & Finance
banking_finance.description: Structuring of complex financial transactions, project financing, COBAC regulatory compliance.

team.label: Our lawyers
team.headline: A Team of Excellence at Your Service
team.description: Our lawyers combine academic rigor and field experience to offer you the best solutions.

jean_pierre.name: Atty. Jean-Pierre Dupont
jean_pierre.bio: Doctor of OHADA Business Law, former World Bank legal advisor. 20 years of experience in Central Africa.

amina.name: Atty. Amina Nkodo
amina.bio: Master in International Taxation (Paris II). Specialist in transfer pricing and tax optimization for multinationals operating in Africa.

paul.name: Atty. Paul Mbassi
paul.bio: Trained at ENAM Yaoundé and the University of Bordeaux. Expert in collective labor relations and social security law.

sarah.name: Atty. Sarah Etoga
sarah.bio: Cameroon Bar laureate (2019). Specialized in supporting startups and SMEs in growth phases.

testimonials.label: Client testimonials
testimonials.headline: The Trust of Our Clients, Our Greatest Honor

t1.content: Dupont & Associates guided us throughout our market entry into Cameroon. Their mastery of OHADA law and their local network were decisive for the success of our establishment.
t1.author: General Manager, French industrial group

t2.content: Professionalism, availability and results. Our 3-year commercial dispute was resolved in 8 months thanks to their arbitration strategy. I highly recommend this firm.
t2.author: CEO, Distribution company

t3.content: Maître Nkodo completely transformed our tax structure. We save 23% on our annual tax burden, in full compliance. Remarkable work.
t3.author: CFO

contact.label: Contact
contact.headline: Let's Discuss Your Project
contact.description: Our lawyers are available for an initial consultation. Contact us through the channel that suits you best.

form.consent_label: I agree that my data will be used to process my request
form.success_message: We will respond within 24 business hours.
form.error_message: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us via WhatsApp.

Yaoundé, Cameroon

footer.description: Business law firm specialized in OHADA, tax and labor law. Your trusted legal partner in Cameroon.
